calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
Petitioner: Jai Nsilo-Gordon, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Isaiah Rashad Burdon, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
After hearing the testimony of the Petitioner, the Petition is DENIED without prejudice.
Petitioner to re-file the Petition with Declarion and Application for an Order Dispensing Notice.
